
<h1 id=name>Matthew A. Turner, PhD</h1>


<h2 id=tagline>Sustainable Organizations Built to Last Centuries</h2>




I build sustainable capacity through

1. Translational research and engineering,
1. Multicultural and interdisciplinary education, and
3. Quantitative social science to improve real world outcomes.



<hr class="hero-divider">



## Generation of Participation in Democracy {style="margin-top: 2rem;"}

<img
  src="images/gpd-logo-square-github.jpeg"
  class="float-left"
  style="width: 150px;"
/>

My nonprofit, the [Generation of Participation in
Democracy - Américas](https://gpdamericas.org), contributes to ongoing efforts
to build autonomous policy planning capacity among
Indigenous and other marginalized peoples in the Américas and beyond.

We develop
educational programs to prepare students of the Américas for local and
international capacity building, including the use of local, private,
sustainable AI for solving problems _better_, not _faster_ or _easier_.

I publish a general public educational newsletter on Substack called the
_Social Science Intelligence Report_:
[ssir.substack.com](https://ssir.substack.com).

In the past few months I have explained [how the Italian political and banking
clan, the Medici, used network science to dominate Florence starting
about 1400](https://ssir.substack.com/p/how-the-medici-solved-power-struggles),
and extract lessons for us to apply to today's coalition buidling.

In another article I explain [Why Today's AI Systems Can't Be
Conscious](https://open.substack.com/pub/ssir/p/why-todays-ai-systems-cant-be-conscious?utm_campaign=post-expanded-share&utm_medium=web).


### Instituto Dourados

<img
  src="images/instituto-logo.jpg"
  class="float-left"
  style="width: 150px;"
/>

_[Instituto Dourados](https://institutodourados.org)_ (i.e., the "Golden
Institute") is the GPD's inaugural _Flagship Institute_. Flagship Institutes
focus on specific, concrete research and public benefit activities (Indigenous
public health at Instituto Dourados), while the GPD manages the business
processes that fund Flagship Institute activities, among other infrastructure
services.

At Instituto Dourados we organize
researchers and students in an international exchnage program to boost autonomy
and effectiveness for Indigenous public health at the Dourados Indigneous
Reserve (_Reserva Indigena de Dourados_) in Dourados, Mato Grosso do Sul,
Brazil.


## SubtleTea Solutions

<img
  src="images/circle-logo-teacup-nowordmark.png"
  class="float-left"
/>

[SubtleTea Solutions, LLC](https://subtleteasolutions.com), is out to prove the claim
that sustainability can be a strategic advantage for businesses. Wise companies want
the most cost-effective solution, not the most viral one currently promoted
online by by Mr. Beast.

We design advanced software available on desktop or
on the web that enables scientific inference and private AI-enhanced assistance.

<hr class="hero-divider">

**Later in 2026 we will begin selling our Sustainable Inference Box, a portable
system for supercomputer cluster-scale capacity on your desktop, featuring:**

1. Local, private AI (Large Language Model - LLM - _inference_)
2. High-performance agent-based modeling to infer theoretical model
   implications, _hypotheses_, before gathering data
3. Markov-chain Monte Carlo generative Bayesian inference for statistical model
   fitting to evaluate the veracity of a hypothesis of interest

The Sustainable Inference Box harnesses NVIDIA's GPU system on a chip (SoC)
Jetson Orin Nano, pre-loaded with a suite of open source computational science
software in a preconfigured Arch Linux ecosystem.

The Sustainable Inference Box will not cost much more than one single year's
ChatGPT Plus subscription. But it keeps your data private by default, be it
sensitive patient data if you're a doctor, or trade secrets if you're an
inventor or manufacturer, for example. It can be powered by solar panels and
batteries with add-on hardware coming in 2027.

We step into the territory of renewables-powered, private, and local AI that has
been totally ceded by all major AI companies.

In the near future we will also be launching online tools for planning
educational interventions to promote adaptive behaviors or develop public health
strategies given stylized real-world constraints.

Stay tuned for updates!


<hr class="hero-divider">


Please [contact us via email](mailto:matt@subtleteasolutions.com) to discuss custom software, hardware,
science-backed organizational solutions, and other custom engagements.

I created this website,
[https://mat.phd](https://mat.phd), and the others I linked to. I would be
happy to help you create an easy-to-maintain website that tells your story that
communicates your full value.

Investors and philanthropists are invited to please [email me
directly](mailto:matt@mat.phd) for current partnership opportunities.

<br>

<div style="padding-left: 8.75%; margin-top: 0.5rem;">

  ![](cafecito-pic.png){.float-left height=225px}

  <p style="font-size: 18px">
  <em>In solidarity and service,</em>
  </p>

  ![](signature.jpg){width=200px}

  <p style="font-size: 18px">
  <strong>Matt Turner, PhD</strong>
  </p> <br>
</div>

<div style="text-align: right; margin-right: 8.75%; font-size: 0.75rem;">
Founder & President <br>
[GPD Américas](https://gpdamericas.org) & [SubtleTea Solutions](https://subtleteasolutions.com) <br>
aka The [Cumulus Community](https://cumulus.community)

<a href="mailto:matt@mat.phd">Email</a>
</div>
